princeJerianBeginnerGuide.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Beginner Guide
princeJerianBeginnerGuide.intro: A beginner-focused guide covering the core ideas players need to understand: making decisions, managing consequences, following the story, and navigating the political and personal challenges surrounding Prince Jerian.

steps.title: Understand the Choice-Based Gameplay
steps.description: Learn how dialogue options and decisions shape events, relationships, and the direction of Jerian's story.

steps.title: Learn the Character and Status Systems
steps.description: Understand how personal development, reputation, and important attributes influence later situations.

steps.title: Manage Political Decisions
steps.description: Approach conflicts and leadership choices carefully because decisions can create long-term consequences.

steps.title: Track Story Consequences
steps.description: Review previous choices and consider how different paths affect future events.

steps.title: Plan Your First Playthrough
steps.description: Choose a roleplay direction and experience the consequences of your decisions throughout Jerian's life.

quickTips: Every dialogue choice can shift relationships, so read options carefully before committing.
Political decisions ripple across chapters and can change which ending you reach.
Keep an eye on sanity and key attributes, since they unlock or block certain responses.
Multiple playthroughs reveal how different leadership styles reshape Prince Jerian's fate.

princeJerianWalkthrough.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Walkthrough
princeJerianWalkthrough.intro: This walkthrough organizes the game's narrative progression into manageable sections, helping players understand important moments without removing the impact of choice-based storytelling.

chapters.title: Beginning of Jerian's story
chapters.description: Introduces Prince Jerian, the setting, and the first decisions that establish the direction of the journey.

chapters.title: Early Decisions and Consequences
chapters.description: Covers the initial choices that influence relationships, political situations, and future events.

chapters.title: Leadership Challenges
chapters.description: Explains how major decisions affect Jerian's position and responsibilities within the empire.

chapters.title: Later Story Paths
chapters.description: Highlights how accumulated choices lead toward different narrative developments and endings.

princeJerianEndingsGuide.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Endings Guide
princeJerianEndingsGuide.intro: A guide to understanding the game's branching outcomes, focusing on how leadership style, personal choices, and political decisions determine the conclusion of Jerian's story.

cards.title: Political Outcome Paths
cards.description: Different approaches to ruling and decision-making can lead to different futures for Jerian and the empire.

cards.title: Personal Relationship Outcomes
cards.description: Choices made throughout the story influence important relationships and narrative results.

cards.title: Leadership Consequences
cards.description: The way Jerian handles challenges affects his final position, reputation, and legacy.

cards.title: Replay Paths
cards.description: Try different choices to experience alternate developments and reach new endings.

princeJerianChoicesGuide.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Choices Guide
princeJerianChoicesGuide.intro: A reference guide for players who want to understand the impact of important choices, including political decisions, personal interactions, and long-term consequences.

rows.impact: Can influence relationships and future story events.
Affect leadership situations and the direction of the realm.
Shape Jerian's development and individual story outcomes.
Create consequences that may appear later in the narrative.

princeJerianCharactersGuide.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Characters Guide
princeJerianCharactersGuide.intro: Characters in The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian represent different interests within the empire. Players must navigate relationships with nobles, the Church, common people, and rival political figures while making decisions that shape the future of Arknia.

cards.title: Prince Jerian
cards.description: The imperial heir of House Tempest and the main protagonist. As the future ruler of the Blessed Arknian Empire, Jerian must balance personal beliefs, political responsibilities, and the demands of powerful factions.

cards.title: Nobility Faction Leader
cards.description: A representative of the empire's aristocratic families who values tradition, influence, and noble privileges. Decisions involving this faction can strengthen or weaken the ruling elite.

cards.title: Church Official
cards.description: A high-ranking religious authority representing the Church's influence over imperial politics. Their support can provide stability but may require difficult compromises.

cards.title: Common People Representative
cards.description: A voice for ordinary citizens affected by taxation, laws, and royal decisions. Supporting this group can improve public trust and create pressure for reform.

cards.title: Royal Family Member
cards.description: A member of the imperial household connected to Jerian's personal life and succession concerns. Their relationships can affect family loyalty and political choices.

cards.title: Political Rival
cards.description: A competing figure seeking influence within the empire. Rival interactions test Jerian's ability to manage threats, alliances, and long-term ambitions.

princeJerianStatsTraits.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Stats and Traits Guide
princeJerianStatsTraits.intro: Prince Jerian's abilities determine which approaches are available during political conflicts and narrative events. Managing strengths and weaknesses is essential for completing different paths and endings.

stats.title: Strength
stats.description: Represents physical capability, authority, and the ability to handle situations requiring force or personal determination.

stats.title: Agility
stats.description: Influences adaptability, quick responses, and handling situations where flexibility is important.

stats.title: Intellect
stats.description: Helps unlock analytical choices, strategic decisions, and solutions during complex political events.

stats.title: Willpower
stats.description: Represents resistance against pressure, emotional struggles, and difficult sacrifices required by leadership.

stats.title: Charisma
stats.description: Improves diplomacy, persuasion, faction relationships, and the ability to influence important characters.

stats.title: Sanity
stats.description: Reflects Jerian's mental condition and affects decision-making during stressful political and personal situations.

princeJerianAchievements.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Achievements Guide
princeJerianAchievements.intro: Achievements reward players for exploring different political paths, discovering outcomes, and completing multiple playthroughs. A complete run requires understanding choices and faction relationships.

rows.title: Story Completion
rows.requirement: Complete the main narrative journey and experience the conclusion of Prince Jerian's first major political path.

rows.title: Ending-Specific Achievement
rows.requirement: Reach a specific ending by maintaining the required faction relationships, decisions, and personal traits.

rows.title: Choice Master
rows.requirement: Successfully navigate important political decisions and demonstrate mastery over the game's choice system.

rows.title: Character Maxed
rows.requirement: Develop key character attributes and maximize important abilities during a playthrough.

rows.title: Hidden Achievements
rows.requirement: Discover secret events, special decisions, or unusual narrative outcomes hidden throughout the story.

rows.title: Completionist
rows.requirement: Complete all Steam achievements by exploring multiple routes and experiencing the full range of outcomes.

princeJerianReleaseUpdates.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Release and Updates
princeJerianReleaseUpdates.intro: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian continues the legacy of choice-driven political RPG storytelling. This section collects important release details and update information for returning players.

cards.title: Platform: Steam PC
cards.description: Available on Steam for Windows PC players who want to experience a choice-driven narrative RPG focused on politics and personal decisions.

cards.title: Developer: Schisma Games
cards.description: Developed by Schisma Games as the continuation of the narrative RPG series following The Life and Suffering of Sir Brante.

cards.title: Publisher: 101XP
cards.description: Published by 101XP, bringing the political storytelling experience to the Steam audience.

cards.title: Release Date: July 20 2026
cards.description: Official release date marking the arrival of Prince Jerian's story and the beginning of his struggle for imperial leadership.

cards.title: Demo Available
cards.description: A demo version provides players with an early look at the game's narrative systems, choices, and political atmosphere.

cards.title: Genre: Narrative RPG
cards.description: A political narrative RPG featuring dialogue choices, faction management, character development, and multiple possible outcomes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian

questions.question: Is The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian a singleplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian is a singleplayer narrative RPG with no multiplayer or co-op modes.

questions.question: What kind of game is The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian?
questions.answer: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian is a political narrative RPG focused on dialogue choices, faction management, character development, and multiple endings.

questions.question: Where can I play The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian?
questions.answer: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian is available on Steam for Windows PC, with a free demo also offered on the Steam store.

questions.question: When was The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian released?
questions.answer: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian was released on July 20, 2026, developed by Schisma Games and published by 101XP.

questions.question: Does The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian have multiple endings?
questions.answer: Yes. The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian features branching outcomes shaped by your political decisions, relationships, and personal traits.

questions.question: Will The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian receive updates?
questions.answer: Yes. The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian continues the series' choice-driven storytelling, and post-launch content news is shared through the official Steam community.
